content.full_text:
State of California Fair Political Practices Commission

P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance • • Administration • • Executive/Legal • • Enforcement • • Statements of Economic Interest
(916) 322-5662        322-5660        322-5901        322-6441        322-6444

September 20, 1983

Don Whitney, Chief
Political Reform Audit Division
Franchise Tax Board
Aerojet Center
Sacramento, CA 95857

Re: Advice Letter No. A-83-212

Dear Mr. Whitney:

This letter is to confirm the telephone advice given by our Technical Assistance and Analysis Division regarding transfers between a candidate's controlled committees during the late contribution period. A transfer from one committee controlled by a candidate to another committee controlled by the same candidate during the late contribution period does not trigger the late contribution filing requirement of Government Code Section 84206. This is true for both primarily formed and general purpose committees controlled by the candidate.

If you have any questions about this, please do not hesitate to call me.

Very truly yours,

[Signature]
Barbara A. Milman
Chief
Legal Division

BAM:plh
cc: Helen Fong
